name: Pasteurized Akkermansia muciniphila MucT
summary: Pasteurized Akkermansia muciniphila MucT preparation tracked for human metabolic and inflammation-linked biomarker studies in overweight, obese, or insulin-resistant adults.
mechanism_summary: Uses a non-live pasteurized Akkermansia preparation intended to influence metabolic, inflammatory, and gut-barrier-linked host signals without relying on durable live engraftment.

open_questions: Whether metabolic biomarker or weight-maintenance signals translate into aging-relevant function
Whether pasteurized product effects should be separated from live-biotherapeutic engraftment claims
Whether benefits are durable beyond short metabolic trials
